name: Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Swiggy App spends (Food, Instamart, Dineout, Genie)

additionalBenefits: Complimentary golf benefits via Mastercard: 12 free lessons and 4 free green fee rounds per calendar year
50% discount on additional green fees (up to Rs 1,800) under the Mastercard India Golf Program
additionalDetails: Cashback is automatically credited as statement credit within 2 working days of billing cycle completion
10% cashback category requires a minimum transaction of Rs 249 (some terms may state Rs 100 for original variant)
5% and 1% cashback categories require a minimum transaction of Rs 100
joiningBenefits: Complimentary 3-month Swiggy One membership worth Rs 1,199 on card activation

selfEmployed: ITR above Rs 6 lakh per annum

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Effective June 21, 2024, cashback is credited as direct statement credit instead of Swiggy Money.
Mastercard World variant provides 12 free golf lessons and 4 free green fee rounds per year via Mastercard concierge (1800-102-6263).
Excludes spends on Swiggy Money Wallet, Swiggy Liquor, and Swiggy Minis/Minis platform.
Utilities and insurance are completely excluded from cashback.
